Headline: #87 87th,  #95 95th Temporary Eastbound Reroute near 91st/Burley.
ShortDescription: Eastbound  87 87th,  95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound  #87 87th,  #95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 91st/Burley.

#87 87th buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Buffalo, 92nd, Baltimore and 91st including the normal route streets.

#95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted via 91st, Brandon, 92nd, and Buffalo including the normal route streets.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #30 South Chicago Temporary Reroute near 91st/Burley
ShortDescription: 30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#30 South Chicago buses temp. rerouted due to, street blockage near 91st/Burley.

Northbound buses will operate via 91st, Buffalo, and 92nd including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via 92nd, Buffalo, and 91st.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier unauthorized person on the tracks at Irving Park. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following an earlier unauthorized person on the tracks at Irving Park.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
